description_long: This object is a rustic wooden guard rail composed of two horizontal logs supported by two vertical posts at each end. The wood appears weathered, with a natural brown coloration and visible grain texture, suggesting it is untreated or minimally finished. The horizontal rails are round and slightly irregular, indicating they are made from whole logs rather than milled lumber. The vertical posts are similarly round and robust, providing structural support and stability. There are no visible fasteners or metal components, and the ends of the rails are bluntly cut, matching the posts. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in parks, rural roadsides, or naturalistic urban settings.
description: A rustic wooden guard rail with two horizontal round logs supported by two vertical posts, featuring a natural brown, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both horizontal rails and the two vertical posts, highlighting the full width and rustic wood texture.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with the thickness of the logs and posts visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the two horizontal rails and vertical posts, with wood grain details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the roundness of the logs.
